stage.goal: Turn a raw idea into a validated problem statement + initial scope.
assumptions: Target users are neurodivergent knowledge workers
quality_bar: MVP scope is explicit: in-scope vs out-of-scope

context.raw_idea: Windows Whisper transcriber with minimal distraction UI
context.success_definition: Transcribe 60min audio locally with clean UX; export txt/md

output.summary: Defined target user, pain, MVP scope, and initial constraints.
decisions: MVP focuses on local transcription + export; no cloud accounts
open_questions_out: Which Whisper backend: faster-whisper vs whisper.cpp?

next.request: Validate constraints & options for local Whisper backends; produce evidence and recommendation. Use S01_idea_intake__artifact_01_main.md as base.
handoff_checklist: Next request references exact artifact filename
